Uses of Class
battleship.model.Cards

Packages that use Cards
Package
Description
battleship.controller
Package of the controller class for BattleshipController.
battleship.model
Package of the model class for BattleShip.
battleship.view
Package of the view classes for Battleship.

    Method
    Description

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    BattleshipController.updateSelfCard(int index, Cards card)
    If one side plays on card of other side, this will be occurred in model.
    void
    IBattleshipController.updateSelfCard(int index, Cards card)
    If one side plays on card of other side, this will be occurred in model.
    Method parameters in battleship.controller with type arguments of type Cards
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    IBattleshipView.loadImages(List<Cards> gameC, List<Cards> handC)
    This method takes the load the images of GameCards and first five HandCards.
    void
    BattleshipController.setEnemyCards(ArrayList<Cards> enemyC)
    When the CardsList of players over network shared, that will be saved by controller in model, and the move will be on enemyCards in this way applied.
    void
    IBattleshipController.setEnemyCards(ArrayList<Cards> enemyC)
    When the CardsList of players over network shared, that will be saved by controller in model, and the move will be on enemyCards in this way applied.

    Methods in battleship.model that return types with arguments of type Cards
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ArrayList<Cards>
    BattleshipGame.getEnemyCards()
    Returns the LIST of EnemyCards.
    ArrayList<Cards>
    BattleshipGame.getGameCards()
    Returns the LIST of GameCards.
    ArrayList<Cards>
    BattleshipGame.getHandCards()

    Methods in battleship.model with parameters of type Cards
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    BattleshipGame.attack(Cards handC, Cards enemy)
    Depending on the enemyCard situation, if it is opened, it is called by moveE() method.
    private void
    BattleshipGame.discover(Cards handC, Cards enemy)
    Depending on the enemyCard situation, if it is not opened, it is called by moveE() method.
    private void
    BattleshipGame.falseAttack(Cards handC)
    When the ship type is submarine and the color of missile red, the player lost its missile and gives no attack on enemy submarine.
    private boolean
    BattleshipGame.isDiscovered(Cards card)
    Returns if the card, on which played opened.
    private boolean
    BattleshipGame.isEnemy(Cards card)
    Returns if the card, on which played belongs to enemy.
    void
    BattleshipGame.move(Cards handC, Cards playedOn)
    Depending on the played card and the card, on which played, it is called the moveE() method or moveO() method.
    private void
    BattleshipGame.moveE(Cards handC, Cards enemy)
    It is the move method to play on enemy card.
    void
    BattleshipGame.moveJ(Cards handC, Cards playedOn, BattleshipGame bsEnemy)
    This method is the main game move method for JShell.
    private void
    BattleshipGame.moveO(Cards handC, Cards ownCard)
    It is the move method to play on own card.
    private void
    BattleshipGame.repair(Cards ship)
    When player repair card on its struck ship played, the defence of ship will be +1.
    private boolean
    BattleshipGame.submarine(Cards card)
    Returns if the card is submarine.
    private void
    BattleshipGame.toPlayedCards(Cards card)
    After each move with this method, played card is sent to playedCards stack and removed from handCards list.
    Method parameters in battleship.model with type arguments of type Cards
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    BattleshipGame.setEnemyCards(ArrayList<Cards> enemyCards)
    Set the enemyCards list.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    Battleship.drawGameC(List<Cards> gameC, processing.core.PImage[] frontCards, processing.core.PImage backCard, int j, int k, int y)
    Draws the cards in 4*3 Bloc.
    private void
    Battleship.drawGameCards(List<Cards> gameC)
    Draws the GameCards with the help of Battleship.drawGameC(List, PImage[], PImage, int, int, int) This draws cards in 4*3 bloc.
    void
    Battleship.loadImages(List<Cards> gameC, List<Cards> handC)
    This method takes the load the images of GameCards and first five HandCards.
